race.comment: BLUESTONE (3) looks very well placed second up to 2400m. His return over 2000m at Caulfield was excellent, back off a pedestrian tempo and flashing home for second behind an all-the-way winner. He should be better for that and sets up very well going to 2400m here. TRAPALANDA (5) has been below his best his past couple, albeit not beaten far in a BM78 at Flemington last time. Out to 2400m now should suit nicely. AMERICAN WOLF (2) was just fair in a field of four at Cranbourne last time, unsuited off a slow tempo there having built nicely prior. He can bounce back. HURRY CURRY (9) is finding it tough to win but may now be looking for this trip and could improve. URBAN OUTLOOK (1) has won two on the bounce over longer trips and will be grinding away late.
